title: ourisia muscosa
intro: Ourisia muscosa, also known as creeping foxglove, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its pink, purple, or white flowers and fuzzy leaves. The medicinal properties of Ourisia muscosa lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Ourisia muscosa typically involve infusions, teas, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various gastrointestinal complaints.
